extension_description.message: Privacy shield for LLM chats. Masks PII before sending to ChatGPT or Claude and restores it in responses.

popup_subtitle.message: PII shield for ChatGPT and Claude.ai

auto_intercept_hint.message: On Enter, mask PII before sending.

auto_intercept_hint_long.message: When you press Enter in a chat, your text is masked before being sent to the LLM. When off, only the manual “Shield” button works.

enabled_hint.message: Global switch. When off, the extension does not touch chat pages.

sites_hint.message: Turn protection on only where you need it. The extension only runs on these domains.

stats_hint.message: Brikko Shield sends no telemetry. These numbers live only in your browser.
